name: Muza Roof Bistro
price_note: Lunch set 36 zł, breakfast 28–38 zł, coffee 10–21 zł
description_en: Rooftop bistro on the 6th floor of the Kraków Academy of Music — right in the heart of the Old Town. Floor-to-ceiling windows and an open terrace offer one of the most breathtaking panoramas in the city: terracotta rooftops, the towers of St. Mary's Basilica, and on clear days, the Tatra Mountains on the horizon. The menu is simple and honest — breakfasts, a rotating daily lunch, and specialty coffee. No tourist markup, no pretension. Just great food, good light, and a view that most Kraków locals haven't even discovered yet.
description_pl: Bistro na dachu Akademii Muzycznej przy ul. Św. Tomasza 43 — w samym sercu Starego Miasta. Panoramiczne widoki na Wawel, Bazylikę Mariacką i krakowskie dachy. Proste, dobre jedzenie: śniadania, zmienny lunch dnia i kawa specialty. Bez turystycznych cen, bez zbędnego przepychu.
insider_tip: Take the elevator to the 6th floor — the entrance is easy to miss. Ask for a window table or go straight to the outdoor terrace for the full 360° view. Come on a weekday morning before 11am to have the whole place almost to yourself. On clear days you can see the Tatra Mountains from here.

what_to_try.why: Their signature breakfast — thick rye-wheat toast loaded with béchamel, Gruyère and ham, topped with a fried egg. Rich, satisfying, and worth every złoty.
Unexpected on a rooftop in Kraków — a fluffy 3-egg omelette with sweet-soy glazed bacon, sesame and chives. The best thing on the breakfast menu.
Rotating daily menu — soup + main course for 36 zł with a view of the entire Old Town. Arguably the best value lunch in central Kraków.
A fruity matcha drink unique to their menu. Order it, sit by the window, and just look at the city.

highlights: Best rooftop panorama in Kraków Old Town
Views of Wawel Castle and St. Mary's Basilica
Hidden gem — not well known to tourists

menu_items.name: Croque Madame

notes: Reopened to public as of spring 2026. Film 'Vinci' was shot here. From April 18, 2026 — weekends open 09:00–16:00.
